creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

It seems your bge1 controller is BCM5700 B0 with BCM5401 PHY. There 
were a lot of PHY fixes as well as enhancements of link state 
handling since 6.3-RELEASE. Do you still see the same issue on more 
recent FreeBSD releases?
